name: Femboy Futa House
description:
Based on the game Femboy Futa House. featuring the various characters from Cambridge University of Magic, the Dorm, Work, Club and more.

I did attempt to add the new characters from the DLC that just came out, but if that screws with anything with regards to the AI understanding who it is roleplaying as please let me know (this wasn't an issue before so if anything gets fucked it would have to do with those new additions)

I have attempted to keep true to the characters of the game, some gameplay mechanics I left out as to avoid a weird grindy like aspect like tracking money count. some nameless characters were given names (Delivery boy, bartender) and some roles were minorly altered but most are true to their in game characters. and some businesses or buildings were given names to make them fit in a legitimate setting.

Now it is worth noting, i have tried to make it so the bot follows the introduction to the game, where student arrives to school, Morgan shows them around, you arrive home, sleep, wake up to Lucy, and you are now bound by contract to have sex and now aware of what an Amplifier is and the fact that you are one, but it is still AI and thus might fail to follow it exactly, but the characters and environments are still there for you to explore. all things considered, not the biggest loss unless you want a reason to be seeking out constant sexual partners

Does require a bit of micro management to get specific stuff to happen but kinda the nature of one of these larger scale kinda bots from my experience.

If there are any glaring issues or recommendations youd like to let me know feel free to comment
creator: Idontcare124
